nasb.text: He made two golden rings for it under its molding, on its two sides—on opposite sides—as holders for poles with which to carry it.

esv.text: and made two rings of gold on it under its molding, on two opposite sides of it, as holders for the poles with which to carry it.

cnv.text: 又替壇做了兩個金環，安放在牙邊以下，壇的兩側，就是壇的兩旁，作穿槓的地方，用來抬壇。

ccb.text: 他造了两个金环，安在坛两侧的金边下面，
